violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Bare-wood shelving in walk in cooler not properly sealed.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. Kitchen cabinets showing wear/peeling laminate.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Ice machine needs cleaning.--Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. General cleaning needed to refrigerators, freezers, cooking equipment, and holding units.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. General cleaning needed.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Hood system needs cleaning.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Three compartment sink was not maintained or operated in the approved three step method. Operate 3 tub sink as follows... 1) Hot soapy water 2) Clear water rinse 3) Sanitizing rinse Air dry utensils. 2nd drying rack set up in 3rd tub of sink.
Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. Walk in cooler compressor drains into floor drain in walk in cooler.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors, walls, & ceilings need cleaning in kitchen and walk in cooler.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
